iotsitewise.assetmodel.assetmodelhierarc: Describes an asset hierarchy that contains a hierarchy's name, `LogicalID`, and child asset model ID that specifies the type of asset that can be in this hierarchy.

iotsitewise.assetmodel.assetmodelhierarc.Description: The Id of the asset model.
The `LogicalID` of the asset model hierarchy. This ID is a `hierarchyLogicalId`.  The maximum length is 256 characters, with the pattern `[^u0000-u001Fu007F]+`
The name of the asset model hierarchy.   The maximum length is 256 characters with the pattern `[^u0000-u001Fu007F]+`.
